apis.name: @ohos.telephony.call
apis.purpose: Call management: dial, make call, check call state, answer/hangup/reject calls

apis.name: @ohos.telephony.sms
apis.purpose: SMS service: send messages, create message from PDU, query default SIM slot

apis.name: @ohos.telephony.radio
apis.purpose: Network search: get network state, signal strength, operator name, radio tech

apis.name: want
apis.purpose: Inter-component information carrier for starting abilities and passing data

apis.name: startAbility
apis.purpose: Launch a UIAbility from context with Want and optional StartOptions

notableFindings: call.dial deprecated from API 9; third-party apps must use call.makeCall to jump to system dialer
call.makeCall(12+) supports Context parameter; (24+) supports MakeCallOptions to hide dial screen
sms.sendMessage deprecated from API 10; use sms.sendShortMessage instead
SMS sending requires system permission ohos.permission.SEND_MESSAGES (system apps only)
Want max data size is 200KB from API 23 (100KB before)
startAbility supports callback and Promise patterns and only runs on main thread
